description_long: This object is a professional audio or video control console, featuring a large rectangular body with a slightly inclined top surface. The top panel is densely populated with an array of physical buttons, rotary knobs, sliders, and a prominent T-bar fader, suggesting its use for live mixing or switching tasks. A medium-sized display screen is embedded on the right side of the control surface, likely for monitoring or menu navigation. The rear panel is equipped with a wide variety of input and output ports, including XLR, RCA, HDMI, and other specialized connectors, indicating compatibility with multiple audio-visual devices. The casing appears to be constructed from matte-finished metal or high-grade plastic, with ventilation grilles on the sides for cooling. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement on a desk or workstation in a control room or event space.
description: A robust audio/video control console with numerous buttons, sliders, a T-bar fader, and a display screen, housed in a matte-finished rectangular case with extensive rear connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main control surface with buttons, sliders, a T-bar fader, and the display screen.
description_view_1: Angled left view highlighting the depth of the console and the arrangement of controls on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide array of input/output ports and connectors for various audio-visual equipment.
description_view_3: Angled right view emphasizing the right-side controls and the display screen's position.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, sliders, rotary knobs, T-bar fader
